texto: If money management isn't something you enjoy, consider my perspective. I look at managing my money as if it were a part-time job. The time you spend monitoring your finances will pay off. You can make real money by cutting expenses and earning more interest on savings and investments. I'd challenge you to find a part-time job where you could potentially earn as much money for just an hour or two of your time.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Laura D. Adams: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “If money management isn't something you enjoy, consider my perspective.
